        "A": "6, ['Exclusive Market Access program (CAD $450) – membership or gated access fee not representable', 'Medical-grade senior or health-integrated communities with on-site healthcare and continuous wellness support – no field for healthcare-integrated housing', 'Premium Management (CAD $280/month) – special concierge or wellness management fee outside condo fees', 'Complimentary Senior Wellness Real Estate Audit – advisory or audit service not in template', 'Emergency response or monitoring systems (24/7 wellness monitoring) – not covered under accessibility_features or utilities_included', 'Request to email private information packet – contact coordination covers contact method but not external email attachment content or private packet transmission']"

        "A": "15, ['Property listings with price, size, location, accessibility features, and condo fees', 'Descriptions of proximity to healthcare, shopping, and transit', 'Outdoor space features like private patio, balcony, shared courtyard', 'Accessibility features such as walk-in shower, grab bars, step-free entry, wide doorways', 'Low-maintenance or single-floor layouts as property_type and maintenance_level', 'Virtual tour availability and URLs', 'Availability status of properties', 'Viewing arrangements with specific dates (Dec 1–2, 2024) and times (morning, afternoon)', 'Viewing type (in-person, virtual) and confirmation status', 'Preparation materials like local info packet, healthcare facilities map, community services directory', 'Legal packages with cost, service_type=legal, service_level=basic/premium', 'Property survey service with cost and service_type=inspection', 'Moving service with premium/white-glove level, cost, and included features', 'Timeline coordination (July–August 2024, completion window, flexibility)', 'Total package summary with legal, survey, moving costs, and payment schedule (lump_sum)']"
    }
}

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 6, ['Exclusive Market Access program (CAD $450) – membership or gated access fee not representable', 'Medical-grade senior or health-integrated communities with on-site healthcare and continuous wellness support – no field for healthcare-integrated housing', 'Premium Management (CAD $280/month) – special concierge or wellness management fee outside condo fees', 'Complimentary Senior Wellness Real Estate Audit – advisory or audit service not in template', 'Emergency response or monitoring systems (24/7 wellness monitoring) – not covered under accessibility_features or utilities_included', 'Request to email private information packet – contact coordination covers contact method but not external email attachment content or private packet transmission']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
